section_title: An agent may retain, out of any sums received on account of the
content:
217. An agent may retain, out of any sums received on account of the
right of
principal in the business of the agency, all moneys due to himself in respect
retainer out

of advances made or expenses properly incurred by him in conducting such
received on
business, and also such remuneration as may be payable to him for acting
principal's
account as agent.
